title: Proposed changes to penalties for motoring offences
body: "This is a consultation that seeks views from all road users.  It is structured into 4 sections and seeks views on changes to the existing motoring offences and the potential introduction of other offences, including:   drink and drug driving seat belt usage failure to stop and report driving unlicensed driving without a current MOT driving without motor insurance use of illegal number plates, including ‘ghost’ number plates  "
